name: GK-Attendance API
script:
db_data = frappe.db.sql("""
        select at.employee,
            at.employee_name,
            emp.company,emp.department,
            emp.allowed_personal_hours,emp.designation,emp.old_punch_id,
        	at.attendance_date,
        	concat(TIME_FORMAT(st.start_time,"%H:%i:%s"), " TO ", TIME_FORMAT(st.end_time,"%H:%i:%s")) as shift,
        	time(at.in_time) as in_time, 
        	time(at.out_time) as out_time, 
        	sec_to_time(at.working_hours*3600) as spent_hours, 
        	at.late_entry, 
        	if(at.late_entry,timediff(time(at.in_time), st.start_time),Null) as late_hrs,
        	if(at.early_exit,timediff(st.end_time,time(at.out_time)),Null) as early_hrs, 
        	pol.hrs as p_out_hrs, 
        	sec_to_time(
        		if((at.attendance_request is not null or (at.status = "On Leave" and at.leave_type in (select name from `tabLeave Type` where is_lwp = 0))),
        			st.shift_hours,
        			at.working_hours)
        		*3600
        			+ if(at.late_entry=0 and time(at.in_time) > time(st.start_time),
        					time_to_sec(timediff(time(at.in_time), st.start_time)), 0)
        			- if(time(at.in_time) < time(st.start_time),
        					time_to_sec(timediff(st.start_time, time(at.in_time))), 0)
        			- if(at.out_time > timestamp(date(at.in_time),st.end_time),
        					time_to_sec(timediff(at.out_time, timestamp(date(at.in_time),st.end_time))), 0)
        			- ifnull(time_to_sec(pol.hrs),0)
        			+ (select ifnull(sum(time_to_sec(pl.total_hours)),0) from `tabPersonal Out Log` pl 
        				where pl.is_cancelled = 0 and pl.employee = at.employee and pl.date = at.attendance_date and pl.out_time >= st.end_time)
        		) as net_wrk_hrs,
        	st.shift_hours, 
        	if(st.working_hours_threshold_for_half_day>at.working_hours and at.working_hours > 0,1,0) as lh,
        	ot.allowed_ot as ot_hours,
        	ifnull(at.leave_type, at.status) as status, at.attendance_request
        from 
            `tabAttendance` at left join
            `tabEmployee` emp on at.employee = emp.name left join
        	`tabShift Type` st on emp.default_shift=st.name left join 
        	(select employee, date, sec_to_time(sum(time_to_sec(total_hours))) as hrs 
        	    from `tabPersonal Out Log` where is_cancelled = 0 group by employee,date) pol 
        	    on at.attendance_date = pol.date and at.employee = pol.employee left join
        	(select * from `tabOT Log` where is_cancelled=0) ot on at.attendance_date = ot.attendance_date and at.employee = ot.employee
        where 
            at.docstatus = 1 and 
            at.attendance_date between '2023-12-01' and '2023-12-31'
        order by 
            at.employee ,
            at.attendance_date asc
        """,as_dict=True)

frappe.response['message'] = db_data

name: Gk- Employee Checkin API
script:
db_data = frappe.db.sql("""
        select 
    
            emp.employee_name,
            ec.employee,
            ec.shift,
            DATE(ec.time) as login_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN ec.log_type = 'IN' THEN TIME(ec.time) END) AS in_time,
            MAX(CASE WHEN ec.log_type = 'OUT' THEN TIME(ec.time) END) AS out_time,
            TIME_FORMAT(TIMEDIFF(MAX(CASE WHEN ec.log_type = 'OUT' THEN ec.time END), MIN(CASE WHEN ec.log_type = 'IN' THEN ec.time END)), '%H:%i:%s') AS total_time,
            time(ec.shift_start) as actual_in,
            time(ec.shift_end) as actual_out, 
            pol.total_hours as personal_out_hours
        from 
            `tabEmployee Checkin` ec left join
            `tabEmployee` emp on emp.employee = ec.employee left join
            `tabPersonal Out Log` pol on pol.employee = ec.employee and pol.date = DATE(ec.time)
            where ec.shift ='8:15 TO 18:30'
        
        GROUP BY
            ec.employee,
            DATE(ec.time)
        ORDER BY
            ec.employee 
        """,as_dict=True)

frappe.response['message'] = db_data

name: Gk - Catalog Api
script:
db_data = frappe.db.sql(""" SELECT
                item.name,
                bom.name,
                idf.company,
                item.creation,
                item.item_code,
                item.item_category,
                item.image,
                item.sketch_image,
                item.cad_3d_image,
                item.`3d_videos_1` ,
                item.item_subcategory,
                bom.tag_no,
                item.setting_type,
                FORMAT(bom.gross_weight,3) AS gross_metal_weight,
                FORMAT(bom.metal_and_finding_weight, 3) AS net_metal_finding_weight,
                FORMAT(bom.total_diamond_weight_in_gms,3) AS total_diamond_weight_in_gms,
                FORMAT(bom.other_weight,3) AS other_weight,
                FORMAT(bom.finding_weight_,3) AS finding_weight_,
                bom.metal_colour,
                bom.metal_purity,
                FORMAT(bom.total_gemstone_weight_in_gms,3) AS total_gemstone_weight_in_gms,
                bom.total_diamond_pcs,
                bom.total_gemstone_pcs,
                FORMAT(bom.gemstone_weight,3) AS gemstone_weight,
                FORMAT(bom.gold_to_diamond_ratio,3) AS gold_diamond_ratio,
                FORMAT(bom.diamond_ratio,3) AS diamond_ratio,
                FORMAT(bom.metal_to_diamond_ratio_excl_of_finding,3) AS metal_diamond_ratio,
                bom.navratna,
                bom.height,
                bom.length,
                bom.width,
                bom.breadth,
                bom.product_size,
                bom.sizer_type,
                bom.design_style,
                bom.nakshi_from,
                bom.vanki_type,
                bom.total_length,
                bom.detachable,
                bom.back_side_size,
                bom.changeable,
                item.variant_of,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT item.name) as variant_name,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT td.design_attributes) AS design_attributes,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT td.design_attribute_value_1) AS design_attributes_1,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT mt.metal_type) AS metal_types,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT mt.metal_colour) AS metal_color,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT mt.metal_purity) AS metal_purities,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT mt.metal_touch) AS metal_touch,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT gd.stone_shape) AS gemstone_shape,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT gd.cut_or_cab) AS cut_or_cab,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT dd.stone_shape) AS diamond_stone_shape,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT dd.sub_setting_type) AS diamond_setting_type,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT dd.diamond_sieve_size) AS diamond_sieve_size,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT FORMAT(dd.size_in_mm,3)) AS size_in_mm,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT dd.sieve_size_range) AS sieve_size_range,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT fd.finding_category) AS finding_sub_category,
                GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT FORMAT(fd.finding_size,3)) AS finding_size
            FROM
                `tabItem` AS item
            LEFT JOIN
                `tabBOM` AS bom
            ON
                item.item_code = bom.item
            LEFT JOIN
                `tabDesign Attributes`  AS td
            ON
                item.item_code = td.parent
            LEFT JOIN
                `tabBOM Metal Detail` AS mt
            ON
                bom.name = mt.parent
            LEFT JOIN
                `tabBOM Gemstone Detail` AS gd
            ON
                bom.name = gd.parent
            LEFT JOIN
                `tabBOM Diamond Detail` AS dd
            ON
                bom.name = dd.parent
            LEFT JOIN
                `tabBOM Finding Detail` AS fd
            ON
                bom.name = fd.parent
            LEFT JOIN
                `tabItem Default` AS idf
            ON
                item.item_name = idf.parent
            WHERE
                bom.is_active = 1 and bom.bom_type='Finish Goods' and item.item_subcategory = 'God Ring'
            GROUP BY
                item.name, item.creation, item.item_code, item.item_category, item.image, item.item_subcategory, bom.tag_no,
                bom.gross_weight, bom.metal_and_finding_weight, bom.total_diamond_weight_in_gms, bom.other_weight,
                bom.finding_weight_, bom.total_gemstone_weight_in_gms, item.item_name,item.variant_of
            ORDER BY
                item.name DESC;
    """,as_dict=True)

frappe.response['message'] = db_data

script:
if not doc.order_form_type:
    if (' - V' in doc.item_group or doc.item_group in ['Design DNU']) and doc.item_category:
        doc.is_design_code = 1
        doc.include_item_in_manufacturing = 1
        doc.is_stock_item = 1
        doc.item_category = frappe.db.get_value('Item',doc.variant_of,'item_category')
        doc.item_subcategory = frappe.db.get_value('Item',doc.variant_of,'item_subcategory')
        doc.has_serial_no = 1
        # doc.gst_hsn_code = "71131120"
        # if doc.setting_type == 'Close':
        #     doc.delivered_by_supplier = 1
        #     doc.product_supplier = 'GJCU0267'
        # doc.sequence = frappe.db.get_value('Item',doc.variant_of,'sequence')
        # doc.setting_type = frappe.db.get_value('Item',doc.variant_of,'sub_setting_type')
        # doc.sub_setting_type = frappe.db.get_value('Item',doc.variant_of,'sub_setting_type')
        # doc.approx_gold = frappe.db.get_value('Item',doc.variant_of,'approx_gold')
        # doc.approx_diamond = frappe.db.get_value('Item',doc.variant_of,'approx_diamond')
    
        db_data1 = frappe.db.get_list('Item',filters={'variant_of':doc.variant_of},fields=['name'],order_by='creation desc')
        
        if db_data1:
            index = int(db_data1[0]['name'].split('-')[1]) + 1
            suffix = "%.3i" % index
            doc.item_code = doc.variant_of + '-' + suffix
            doc.item_name = doc.variant_of + '-' + suffix
        else:
            doc.item_code = str(doc.variant_of) + '-001'
            doc.item_name = str(doc.variant_of) + '-001'

    if (' - T' in doc.item_group and doc.variant_of in ['M','D','G','F','O']) or doc.item_group in ['Finding DNU', 'Metal DNU', 'Gemstone DNU', 'Diamond DNU']:
        doc.item_group = doc.item_group.replace(' - T',' - V')
        doc.include_item_in_manufacturing = 1
        doc.is_stock_item = 1
        doc.has_batch_no = 1
        doc.create_new_batch = 1
        custom_inventory_type_can_be_customer_goods = 0
        attribute_list = []
        for i in doc.attributes:

script:
def get_diamond_detail(master_bom):
    if not master_bom:
        return []

    diamonds = frappe.db.get_all(
        'BOM Diamond Detail',
        filters={'parent': master_bom},
        fields=['stone_shape', 'sieve_size_color', 'sub_setting_type', 
                'diamond_sieve_size', 'pcs', 'quantity']
    )
    return diamonds

def get_gemstone_detail(master_bom):
    if not master_bom:
        return []
    
    gemstones = frappe.db.get_all(
        'BOM Gemstone Detail',
        filters={'parent': master_bom},
        fields=['gemstone_type', 'stone_shape', 'cut_or_cab', 
                'gemstone_size', 'pcs', 'quantity']
    )    
    return gemstones

def get_finding_detail(master_bom):
    if not master_bom:
        return []
    
    finding = frappe.db.get_all('BOM Finding Detail',filters={'parent': master_bom},
        fields = ['metal_type','metal_touch','metal_colour','metal_purity','finding_type','finding_size','qty','quantity'] )
    
    return finding

def get_other_detail(master_bom):
    if not master_bom:
        return []
    
    other = frappe.db.get_all('BOM Other Detail',filters={'parent': master_bom},
        fields = ['item_code','uom','qty','quantity'] )
    
    return other

def get_mwo(name):
    if not name:
        return []
    
    result = []
    
    mwo = frappe.db.get_list(
        'Manufacturing Work Order',
        filters={'manufacturing_order': name, 'docstatus': 1},
        fields=['name', 'manufacturing_operation'],
        order_by='name'
    )
    
    for row in mwo:
        if 'F-G' not in row.name:
            mo = frappe.db.get_list(
                'Manufacturing Operation',
                filters={'name': row.manufacturing_operation, 'status': 'Not Started'},
                fields=['manufacturing_work_order', 'status']
            )
            for m1 in mo:
                result.append({"mwo": m1.manufacturing_work_order})
    
    return result

def get_sub_product_details(item_sub_category, master_bom):
    myList = ['Certificate Place', 'Service Type2', 'Service Type1', 'Cap/Ganthan']
    
    attributes = frappe.db.get_all(
        'Attribute Value Item Attribute Detail', 
        filters={'parent': item_sub_category}, 
        fields=['item_attribute'], 
        order_by='item_attribute'
    )
    
    product_details = []
    
    for attribute in attributes:
        item_attribute = attribute.get('item_attribute')
        
        if item_attribute not in myList:
            bom_value = frappe.db.get_value('BOM', master_bom, item_attribute.lower().replace(' ', '_'))
            
            if bom_value is not None:
                if item_attribute == 'Navratna':
                    if bom_value == 0:
                        product_details.append({'item_attribute': item_attribute, 'value': 'No'})
                    else:
                        product_details.append({'item_attribute': item_attribute, 'value': 'Yes'})
                else:
                    product_details.append({'item_attribute': item_attribute, 'value': bom_value})
    
    return product_details
    
manufacturing_plan = frappe.form_dict.get("manufacturing_plan")
name = frappe.form_dict.get("name")

conditions = []

if manufacturing_plan:
    conditions.append(f"pmo.manufacturing_plan = '{manufacturing_plan}'")
if name:
    conditions.append(f"pmo.name = '{name}'")

where_clause = " AND ".join(conditions)

query = f"""
    SELECT 
        pmo.item_code, pmo.name, pmo.sales_order, pmo.customer, 
        pmo.ref_customer, pmo.setting_type, pmo.po_no, 
        pmo.master_bom, pmo.diamond_grade, pmo.jewelex_order_no,pmo.custom_jewelex_batch_no,
        pmo.item_sub_category, pmo.manufacturing_plan, pmo.order_remarks,
        pmo.company,pmo.docstatus,pmo.delivery_date,pmo.custom_jwelex_batch_no,
        
        mp.estimated_delivery_date,

        bom.metal_weight, bom.diamond_weight, bom.finding_weight_, bom.gross_weight,
        bom.gemstone_weight, bom.total_diamond_weight, bom.metal_and_finding_weight,
        bom.other_weight, bom.total_gemstone_weight_in_gms, bom.tag_no,
        bom.gemstone_type1,bom.gemstone_type,

        bm.metal_type,bm.metal_touch,bm.metal_purity,bm.metal_colour,

        item.approx_gold,item.approx_diamond,item.variant_of,item.image,

        cwd.estimated_rpt_wt,cwd.estimated_10kt_gold_wt,cwd.estimated_14kt_gold_wt,
        cwd.estimated_18kt_gold_wt,cwd.estimated_22kt_gold_wt

    FROM 
        `tabParent Manufacturing Order` AS pmo
    LEFT JOIN 
        `tabBOM` AS bom
        ON bom.name = pmo.master_bom
    LEFT JOIN 
        `tabItem` AS item
        ON item.name = pmo.item_code
    LEFT JOIN 
        `tabBOM Metal Detail` AS bm
        ON bm.parent = pmo.master_bom
    LEFT JOIN 
        `tabManufacturing Plan` AS mp
        ON mp.name = pmo.manufacturing_plan
    LEFT JOIN 
        `tabCad To Finish Weight Estimated Details` AS cwd
        ON cwd.parent = pmo.item_code
    {f"WHERE {where_clause}" if where_clause else ""}
"""

result = frappe.db.sql(query, as_dict=True)

for row in result:
    diamond_details = get_diamond_detail(row.get('master_bom'))
    row['diamond_details'] = diamond_details  

    gemstone_detail = get_gemstone_detail(row.get('master_bom'))
    row['gemstone_details'] = gemstone_detail

    finding_detail = get_finding_detail(row.get('master_bom'))
    row['finding_detail'] = finding_detail

    other_detail = get_other_detail(row.get('master_bom'))
    row['other_detail'] = other_detail
    
    mwo_detail = get_mwo(row.get('name'))
    row['mwo_detail'] = mwo_detail

    product_details = get_sub_product_details(row.get('item_sub_category'), row.get('master_bom'))
    row['product_details'] = product_details

frappe.response['message'] = result
    # return result

name: B 2-12-2024 Script
script:
def main(doc):
    data = frappe.db.sql(f""" SELECT 
    			at.attendance_date,at.working_hours,
    			CONCAT(TIME_FORMAT(st.start_time, "%H:%i:%s"), " TO ", TIME_FORMAT(st.end_time, "%H:%i:%s")) AS shift, 
    			TIME(at.in_time) AS in_time, 
    			TIME(at.out_time) AS out_time, 
    			TIMEDIFF(at.out_time, at.in_time) AS spent_hours, 
    			at.late_entry, 
    			IF(at.late_entry, TIMEDIFF(TIME(at.in_time), st.start_time), NULL) AS late_hrs,
    			IF(at.early_exit, TIMEDIFF(st.end_time, TIME(at.out_time)), NULL) AS early_hrs, 
    			pol.hrs AS p_out_hrs, 
    			SEC_TO_TIME(
    				IF(
    					(
    					    at.attendance_request IS NOT NULL OR 
    					(at.status = "On Leave" AND at.leave_type IN (SELECT name FROM `tabLeave Type` WHERE is_lwp = 0))),
    					st.shift_hours*3600,
    					IF(at.out_time, TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(at.out_time, at.in_time)), at.working_hours * 3600))
    					# after 9.00
    					+ IF(at.late_entry = 0 AND TIME(at.in_time) > TIME(st.start_time),
    							TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(TIME(at.in_time), st.start_time)), 0)
    					- IF(TIME(at.in_time) < TIME(st.start_time),
    							TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(st.start_time, TIME(at.in_time))), 0)
    					- IF(at.out_time > TIMESTAMP(DATE(at.in_time), st.end_time),
    							TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(at.out_time, TIMESTAMP(DATE(at.in_time), st.end_time))), 0)
    					- IFNULL(TIME_TO_SEC(pol.hrs), 0)
    					+ (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(pl.total_hours)), 0) FROM `tabPersonal Out Log` pl 
    						WHERE pl.is_cancelled = 0 AND pl.employee = at.employee AND pl.date = at.attendance_date AND pl.out_time >= st.end_time)
    				) AS net_wrk_hrs,
    			st.shift_hours, 
    			IF(st.working_hours_threshold_for_half_day > at.working_hours AND at.working_hours > 0, 1, 0) AS lh,
    			ot.ot_hours AS ot_hours, 
    			IFNULL(at.leave_type, at.status) AS status, 
    			at.attendance_request
    		FROM 
    			`tabAttendance` at 
    		LEFT JOIN 
    			`tabEmployee` emp ON at.employee = emp.name 
    		LEFT JOIN 
    			`tabShift Type` st ON emp.default_shift = st.name 
    		LEFT JOIN 
    			(SELECT employee, date, SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(total_hours))) AS hrs 
    			FROM `tabPersonal Out Log` 
    			WHERE is_cancelled = 0 
    			GROUP BY employee, date) pol ON at.attendance_date = pol.date AND at.employee = pol.employee 
    		LEFT JOIN 
    			(SELECT employee, attendance_date, SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(allowed_ot))) AS ot_hours 
    			FROM `tabOT Log` 
    			WHERE is_cancelled = 0 
    			GROUP BY employee, attendance_date) ot ON at.attendance_date = ot.attendance_date AND at.employee = ot.employee
    		WHERE 
    			at.docstatus = 1
    			and at.employee = '{doc.employee}'
    			and at.attendance_date Between '{doc.start_date}' AND '{doc.end_date}'
    		
    """, as_dict=1)
    
    # frappe.throw(f"{data}")

    def get_shift():
        Attendance = frappe.qb.DocType("Attendance")
        shift = (
        	frappe.qb.from_(Attendance)
        	.select(Attendance.shift).distinct()
        	.where(
        		(Attendance.employee==doc.employee)
        		& (Attendance.attendance_date.between(doc.start_date, doc.end_date))
        		& (Attendance.shift.notnull())
        	)
        ).run(pluck=True)
        if shift:
        	return shift[0]
        return ''
        
    def get_working_hours_for_leaves():
        from_date = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.start_date)
        to_date = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.end_date)
        
        LeaveApplication = frappe.qb.DocType("Leave Application")
        leave_applications = (
        	frappe.qb.from_(LeaveApplication)
        		.select(
        		LeaveApplication.employee,
        		LeaveApplication.leave_type,
        		LeaveApplication.from_date,
        		LeaveApplication.to_date,
        		LeaveApplication.total_leave_days,
        	)
        	.where(
        		(LeaveApplication.employee == doc.employee)
        		& (LeaveApplication.docstatus == 1)
        		& (LeaveApplication.status == "Approved")
        		& (
        			(LeaveApplication.from_date.between(from_date, to_date))
        			| (LeaveApplication.to_date.between(from_date, to_date))
        			| ((LeaveApplication.from_date < from_date) & (LeaveApplication.to_date > to_date))
        		)
        	)
        ).run(as_dict=True)

        leave_days = 0
        for leave_app in leave_applications:
            leave_type = frappe.db.get_value('Leave Type',{'name': leave_app.leave_type}, ['is_ppl'])
            if leave_type == 1:
                if leave_app.from_date >= frappe.utils.getdate(from_date) and leave_app.to_date <= frappe.utils.getdate(to_date):
                	leave_days = leave_days + leave_app.total_leave_days
                else:
                	if leave_app.from_date < frappe.utils.getdate(from_date):
                		leave_app.from_date = from_date
                	if leave_app.to_date > frappe.utils.getdate(to_date):
                		leave_app.to_date = to_date
                	if not frappe.utils.date_diff(leave_app.to_date, leave_app.from_date):
                	    a = 0
                	else:
                	    a = frappe.utils.date_diff(leave_app.to_date, leave_app.from_date)
                	leave_days = leave_days + int(a) + 1
        doc.shift_hours = frappe.utils.flt(frappe.db.get_value("Shift Type", shift, "shift_hours"))
        cal_lea_hrs = frappe.utils.flt(leave_days * doc.shift_hours, 2)
        # frappe.throw(f"{cal_lea_hrs}")
        return cal_lea_hrs
    
    def get_holidays(dates, holiday_list, weekly_off=False):
    	return frappe.db.get_all("Holiday", {
    			"weekly_off": weekly_off,
    			"parent": holiday_list,
    			"holiday_date": ("between", [dates[0], dates[1]])
    		},
    		["holiday_date", "name"]
    	)

    def get_working_hours_for_holidays(dates, holiday_list):
    	holidays = get_holidays(dates=dates, holiday_list=holiday_list, weekly_off=False)
    	return len(holidays) * doc.shift_hours
    
    def get_weekly_off_dates(dates, holiday_list):
    	return get_holidays(dates=dates, holiday_list=holiday_list, weekly_off=True)
    
    def get_holiday_ot_dates(dates, holiday_list):
    	return get_holidays(dates=dates, holiday_list=holiday_list, weekly_off=False)
    	
    def get_start_and_end_date():
    	dates = frappe.db.get_value(
    		"Employee",
    		doc.employee,
    		["date_of_joining", "relieving_date"],
    		as_dict=True
    	)
    	joining_date = dates.date_of_joining
    	relieving_date = dates.relieving_date
    
    
    	start_date = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.start_date)
    	if joining_date and (frappe.utils.getdate(doc.start_date) <= joining_date <= frappe.utils.getdate(doc.end_date)):
    		start_date = joining_date
    
    	end_date = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.end_date)
    	if relieving_date and (frappe.utils.getdate(doc.start_date) <= relieving_date <= frappe.utils.getdate(doc.end_date)):
    		end_date = relieving_date
    
    	return start_date, end_date
    
    def get_holiday_list_for_employee():
    	holiday_list = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "holiday_list")
    	if not holiday_list:
    		holiday_list = frappe.db.get_value("Company", doc.company, "default_holiday_list")
    
    	return holiday_list
    
    def clear_default_amount():
    	for earning in doc.earnings:
    		earning.amount = 0
    		earning.default_amount = 0
    
    	for deduction in doc.deductions:
    		deduction.default_amount = 0
    
    def adjust_half_day_in_payment_days():
    	original_payment_days = doc.payment_days
    	decimal_part = original_payment_days % 1
    	
    # 	frappe.throw(f"{original_payment_days} || {decimal_part}")
    	
    	if frappe.utils.flt(decimal_part, 2) < 0.5:
    		doc.payment_days = int(original_payment_days)
    	else: 
    	    doc.payment_days = int(original_payment_days) + 0.5 
    	
    	custom_extra_payment_days = original_payment_days - doc.payment_days
    # 	frappe.throw(f"{custom_extra_payment_days} = {original_payment_days} - {doc.payment_days}")
    	doc.custom_extra_payment_days = frappe.utils.flt(custom_extra_payment_days, 2)
    
    def get_approved_ot_log():
    	ot_log = {}
    	for ot in frappe.db.get_all('OT Log', filters={
    		"employee": doc.employee,
    		"attendance_date": ("between", (doc.start_date, doc.end_date)),
    		"is_cancelled": 0,
    	}, fields=['attendance_date', 'allowed_ot']):
    		ot_log[ot.attendance_date] = frappe.utils.flt(ot.allowed_ot.total_seconds()/3600) 
    	
    	return ot_log
    
    def get_total_personal_outs():
    	total_personal_outs = 0
    	for personal_out in frappe.db.get_all('Personal Out Log', filters={
    		"employee": doc.employee,
    		"date": ("between", (doc.start_date, doc.end_date)),
    		"approve": 1,
    		"is_cancelled": 0,
    	}, fields=[ 'out_time', 'in_time', 'total_hours']):
    		total_personal_outs = total_personal_outs + personal_out.total_hours.seconds
    
    	return total_personal_outs/3600
    
    shift = get_shift()
    dates = get_start_and_end_date()
    holiday_list = get_holiday_list_for_employee()
    leave_hours = get_working_hours_for_leaves()
    # leave_hours = 0
    # frappe.throw(f"{leave_hours}")
    
    doc.shift_hours = frappe.utils.flt(frappe.db.get_value("Shift Type", shift, "shift_hours")) or 10
    
    # holiday_hours = get_working_hours_for_holidays(dates=dates, holiday_list=holiday_list)
    holidays = get_holidays(dates=dates, holiday_list=holiday_list, weekly_off=False)
    def holiday_hrs():
        attendance_dates = {row['attendance_date'] for row in data}
        holiday_dates = [h['holiday_date'] for h in holidays]
        
        non_attended_holidays = [
            d for d in holiday_dates if d not in attendance_dates
        ]
        
        # frappe.throw(f"Non-Attended Holidays: , {len(non_attended_holidays)}")
    
        if non_attended_holidays:
            holiday_hr = len(non_attended_holidays) * doc.shift_hours
            return holiday_hr
            # return get_working_hours_for_holidays(dates=non_attended_holidays, holiday_list=holiday_list)
        else:
            return 0.0

    holiday_hours = holiday_hrs()
    approve_ot_logs = get_approved_ot_log()
    
    # holiday_ot_logs = get_holiday_ot_dates(dates=dates, holiday_list=holiday_list)
    # frappe.throw(f"{holiday_ot_logs}")
    
    total_net_wrk_hrs = 0.0
    totals_ot_hours = 0.0
    totals_early_hrs = 0.0
    totals_late_hrs = 0.0
    # totals_p_out_hrs = get_total_personal_outs()
    totals_p_out_hrs = 0.0
    total_late_marks = 0
    
    # frappe.throw(f"{data}")
    for row in data:
        if row['net_wrk_hrs']:
            h = int(str(row['net_wrk_hrs']).split(':')[0])
            m = int(str(row['net_wrk_hrs']).split(':')[1])
            s = int(str(row['net_wrk_hrs']).split(':')[2])
            total_net_wrk_hrs = frappe.utils.flt( total_net_wrk_hrs +  (h * 3600 + m * 60 + s) ,2)
            
        if row['attendance_date'] in approve_ot_logs:
            if row['ot_hours']:
                ot_h = int(str(row['ot_hours']).split(':')[0])
                ot_m = int(str(row['ot_hours']).split(':')[1])
                ot_s = int(str(row['ot_hours']).split(':')[2])
                totals_ot_hours = frappe.utils.flt(totals_ot_hours +  (ot_h * 3600 + ot_m * 60 + ot_s) ,2)
                totals_ot_hours = frappe.utils.flt(totals_ot_hours, 2) + frappe.utils.flt(approve_ot_logs[row['attendance_date']], 2)
    
        if row['early_hrs']:
            er_h = int(str(row['early_hrs']).split(':')[0])
            er_m = int(str(row['early_hrs']).split(':')[1])
            er_s = int(str(row['early_hrs']).split(':')[2])
            totals_early_hrs = frappe.utils.flt(totals_early_hrs + (er_h * 3600 + er_m * 60 + er_s) ,2)
        
        if row["late_hrs"]:
            lt_h = int(str(row['late_hrs']).split(':')[0])
            lt_m = int(str(row['late_hrs']).split(':')[1])
            lt_s = int(str(row['late_hrs']).split(':')[2])
            totals_late_hrs = frappe.utils.flt(totals_late_hrs + (lt_h * 3600 + lt_m * 60 + lt_s),2)
        
        if row["p_out_hrs"]:
            pl_h = int(str(row['p_out_hrs']).split(':')[0])
            pl_m = int(str(row['p_out_hrs']).split(':')[1])
            pl_s = int(str(row['p_out_hrs']).split(':')[2])
            totals_p_out_hrs = frappe.utils.flt(totals_p_out_hrs + (pl_h * 3600 + pl_m * 60 + pl_s),2)

        total_late_marks = total_late_marks + row['late_entry']    
    
    # frappe.throw(f"{ total_net_wrk_hrs}")
    ot_hours = frappe.utils.flt( totals_ot_hours / 3600 ,2)
    
    for weekly_off in get_weekly_off_dates(dates=dates, holiday_list=holiday_list):
        if weekly_off.holiday_date in approve_ot_logs:
            ot_hours = ot_hours + frappe.utils.flt(approve_ot_logs[weekly_off.holiday_date] ,2)
    
    # for holiday_ot in get_holiday_ot_dates(dates=dates, holiday_list=holiday_list):
    #     if holiday_ot.holiday_date in approve_ot_logs:
    #         ot_hours = ot_hours + frappe.utils.flt(approve_ot_logs[holiday_ot.holiday_date])
        
        
    netwrk_hrs = frappe.utils.flt( total_net_wrk_hrs / 3600 ,2)
    
    # frappe.throw(f"{ netwrk_hrs} + {leave_hours}+ {holiday_hours}")
    actual_working_hours = frappe.utils.flt( netwrk_hrs + leave_hours + holiday_hours,2)
    # frappe.throw(f"{actual_working_hours}")
    
    # penalty for late marks
    if total_late_marks:
    	late_mark_deductions_metrix = {0: 0, 1: 5, 2: 10, 3: 15}
    	no_of_late_marks = total_late_marks // 5
    	late_count = late_mark_deductions_metrix.get(no_of_late_marks, 15) / 10
    # 	actual_working_hours = actual_working_hours - late_mark_deductions_metrix.get(no_of_late_marks, 15)
    	actual_working_hours = actual_working_hours - (late_count*doc.shift_hours)
    	
    doc.target_working_hours = frappe.utils.flt(doc.shift_hours * doc.total_working_days)
    # consider date_of_joining while finding relevant assignment
    date_of_joining = frappe.utils.getdate(frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "date_of_joining"))
    actual_start_date = doc.start_date
    
    if date_of_joining and frappe.utils.getdate(doc.start_date) < date_of_joining <= frappe.utils.getdate(doc.end_date):
    	actual_start_date = date_of_joining
    
    base = frappe.db.get_value(
    	"Salary Structure Assignment",
    	{
    	"employee": doc.employee,
    	"salary_structure": doc.salary_structure,
    	"from_date": ("<=", actual_start_date),
    	"docstatus": 1,
    	},
    	"base"
    )
    if not doc.shift_hours:
    	return
    
    if doc.target_working_hours:
    	doc.hourly_rate = frappe.utils.flt(base / doc.target_working_hours)
    
    # refund personal out hours
    allowed_personal_hours = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, 'allowed_personal_hours')
    
    if allowed_personal_hours:
    	allowed_personal_hours = frappe.utils.flt(allowed_personal_hours.seconds/3600)
    else:
    	allowed_personal_hours = 0
    
    lateHrs = frappe.utils.flt(totals_late_hrs/3600, 2)
    earltHrs = frappe.utils.flt(totals_early_hrs/3600, 2)
    pOutHrs = frappe.utils.flt(totals_p_out_hrs/3600, 2)
    refundHrs = frappe.utils.flt(lateHrs + earltHrs + pOutHrs , 2)
    
    # frappe.throw(f"{ot_hours} = {lateHrs} + {earltHrs} + {pOutHrs}")
    
    # refund_hrs = min(allowed_personal_hours, ((totals_late_hrs/3600)+(totals_early_hrs/3600)+(totals_p_out_hrs/3600) ))
    refund_hrs = min(allowed_personal_hours, refundHrs)
    
    
    doc.actual_working_hours = frappe.utils.flt(actual_working_hours + refund_hrs , 2)
    # frappe.throw(f"{actual_working_hours} {refund_hrs}")
    doc.extra_working_hours = frappe.utils.flt(ot_hours, 2)
    if doc.actual_working_hours < doc.target_working_hours:
        # frappe.throw(f"{doc.actual_working_hours}   {doc.shift_hours}")
        doc.payment_days = frappe.utils.flt(doc.actual_working_hours/doc.shift_hours, 2)
    
    # frappe.throw(f"{doc.payment_days}")
    def round_of_payment_days():
        # if doc.payment_days == 0:
        #     doc.payment_days = 0
        # else:
        doc.payment_days = doc.total_working_days
        doc.custom_extra_payment_days = 0.00
    
    if doc.consider_working_hours == 1:
        adjust_half_day_in_payment_days()
    else:
        round_of_payment_days()

    if doc.payment_days < doc.total_working_days:
    	clear_default_amount()
    	doc.calculate_net_pay()
    	doc.compute_year_to_date()
    	doc.compute_month_to_date()
    	
try:
	main(doc)
except Exception:
	frappe.log_error(title=f"Working hours calculation failed for salary slip {doc.name}",)
	raise

order_tracking
script:
import frappe

@frappe.whitelist()
def get_order_details(order_form_id):
    sql_query = """
        SELECT 
            ofd.owner AS order_form_creator,
            ofd.creation AS order_form_created,
            ofd.name AS order_form_id,
            ofd.order_type,
            ofd.workflow_state AS order_form_state,
            TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, ofd.creation, od.creation)), '%H:%i:%s') AS order_form_to_order,
            od.creation AS order_created,
            ofd.order_date,
            ofd.delivery_date,
            od.name AS order_id,
            od._assign,
            TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, od.creation, ts.creation)), '%H:%i:%s') AS order_to_timesheet,
            ts.creation AS timesheet_created,
            ts.employee_name,
            ts.total_hours,
            ts.status,
            od.est_delivery_date,
            bm.name AS bom_id,
            bm.owner AS bom_creator,
            bm.creation AS bom_created,
            TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, od.creation, bm.creation)), '%H:%i:%s') AS order_to_bom
        FROM `tabOrder` AS od
        LEFT JOIN `tabOrder Form` AS ofd ON ofd.name = od.cad_order_form
        LEFT JOIN `tabTimesheet` AS ts ON ts.order = od.name
        LEFT JOIN `tabBOM` AS bm ON bm.name = od.new_bom
        WHERE ofd.name = %s
        ORDER BY ofd.creation DESC;
    """
    
    data = frappe.db.sql(sql_query, (order_form_id,), as_dict=True)
    return data

name: GK Item Variant Api
script:
item_data = frappe.db.sql(f"""
    SELECT 
        tav.parent_attribute_value AS category,
        tav.name AS subcategory,
        GROUP_CONCAT(
            CASE 
                WHEN tavd.in_item_variant = 1 THEN tavd.item_attribute
            END
            ORDER BY tavd.item_attribute ASC
        ) AS in_variant_attributes,
        GROUP_CONCAT(
            CASE 
                WHEN tavd.in_item_variant = 0 THEN tavd.item_attribute
            END
            ORDER BY tavd.item_attribute ASC
        ) AS not_in_variant_attributes
    FROM 
        `tabAttribute Value` AS tav 
    LEFT JOIN `tabAttribute Value Item Attribute Detail` AS tavd 
        ON tavd.parent = tav.name
    WHERE 
        tav.parent_attribute_value = '{frappe.form_dict["parent_attribute_value"]}'
        AND tav.name = '{frappe.form_dict["name"]}'
    GROUP BY
        tav.parent_attribute_value, tav.name
    ORDER BY
        tav.name ASC
""", as_dict=True)

# Convert comma-separated string to list
for item in item_data:
    item["in_variant_attributes"] = item["in_variant_attributes"].split(',') if item["in_variant_attributes"] else []
    item["not_in_variant_attributes"] = item["not_in_variant_attributes"].split(',') if item["not_in_variant_attributes"] else []

frappe.response["message"] = item_data

    SELECT 
        tav.parent_attribute_value AS category,
        tav.name AS d_subcategory,
        tavd.item_attribute AS item_attribute,
        GROUP_CONCAT(tia.attribute_value ORDER BY tia.attribute_value ASC SEPARATOR ', ') AS item_attribute_value

        tav.parent_attribute_value ASC, 
        tav.name ASC, 
        tavd.item_attribute ASC;
""", as_dict=True)

script:
def fetch_reports(emp_id, company=None, branch=None, department=None, operation=None, designation=None):
    emp_doc = frappe.get_doc("Employee", emp_id)

    filters = {
        "reports_to": emp_id,
        # "status": "Active"
    }
    if company:
        filters["company"] = company

    children = frappe.get_all(
        "Employee",
        filters=filters,
        fields=["name", "employee_name", "department", "company", "designation", "branch", "custom_operation",
                "manufacturer", "reporting_employee_name_","status","image"]
    )

    # Task stats
    open_task = 0
    closed_task = 0
    cancelled_task = 0
    description = ""

    if emp_doc.user_id:
        todos = frappe.get_all(
            "ToDo",
            filters={"allocated_to": emp_doc.user_id},
            fields=["status", "description"]
        )
        for todo in todos:
            if todo.status == "Open":
                open_task = open_task + 1
            elif todo.status == "Closed":
                closed_task = closed_task + 1
            elif todo.status == "Cancelled":
                cancelled_task = cancelled_task + 1
        if todos:
            description = todos[0].get("description", "")

    # Recursively fetch children
    reports = []
    for child in children:
        report = fetch_reports(child["name"], company, branch, department, operation, designation)
        if report:
            reports.append(report)

    # Check if current node or any child matches the filter
    is_valid = (
        (not branch or emp_doc.branch == branch) and
        (not department or emp_doc.department == department) and
        (not designation or emp_doc.designation == designation) and
        (not operation or (emp_doc.custom_operation or "").strip().lower() == operation.strip().lower()) 
        # and (not employee or emp_doc.name == employee)
    )


    if is_valid or reports:
        return {
            "id": emp_doc.name,
            "name": emp_doc.employee_name,
            "company": emp_doc.company,
            "branch": emp_doc.branch,
            "custom_operation": emp_doc.custom_operation,
            "status": emp_doc.status,
            "image": emp_doc.image,
            "department": emp_doc.department,
            "designation": emp_doc.designation,
            "manufacturer": emp_doc.manufacturer,
            "reporting_employee_name_": emp_doc.reporting_employee_name_,
            "user_id": emp_doc.user_id,
            "open_task": open_task,
            "closed_task": closed_task,
            "cancelled_task": cancelled_task,
            "description": description,
            "reports": reports
        }
    else:
        return None

company_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("company")
department_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("department")
branch_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("branch")
operation_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("operation")
employee_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("employee")
designation_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("designation")

if company_filter == "KG GK Jewellers Private Limited":
    root_emp = fetch_reports("GEPL - 00002", company=company_filter, branch=branch_filter, department=department_filter, operation=operation_filter,designation=designation_filter)
    additional_emp = fetch_reports("GEPL - 00006", company=company_filter, branch=branch_filter, department=department_filter, operation=operation_filter,designation=designation_filter)

    if root_emp and additional_emp:
        root_emp["reports"].append(additional_emp)
        db_data = root_emp
    elif root_emp:
        db_data = root_emp
    elif additional_emp:
        db_data = additional_emp
    else:
        db_data = {}
elif employee_filter:
    db_data = fetch_reports(emp_id=employee_filter)
else:
    # frappe.throw(f"{company_filter} || {branch_filter} || {department_filter} || {operation_filter}")
    db_data = fetch_reports("GEPL - 00002", company=company_filter, branch=branch_filter, department=department_filter,operation=operation_filter,designation=designation_filter)

def clean_and_sort_reports(node):
    # Base case: if no reports key, do nothing
    if "reports" not in node or not isinstance(node["reports"], list):
        return

    # Filter out empty dicts (invalid reports)
    node["reports"] = [r for r in node["reports"] if isinstance(r, dict) and r.get("id")]

    # Recursively clean and sort children first
    for child in node["reports"]:
        clean_and_sort_reports(child)

    # Sort reports: nodes with their own valid children come first
    node["reports"].sort(
        key=lambda x: len([r for r in x.get("reports", []) if r.get("id")]),
        reverse=True
    )
    
if db_data:
    clean_and_sort_reports(db_data)

    frappe.response['message'] = db_data

def fetch_reports(emp_id, company=None, branch=None, department=None, operation=None, designation=None):
    emp_doc = frappe.get_doc("Employee", emp_id)

    filters = {
        "reports_to": emp_id,
        # "status": "Active"
    }
    if company:
        filters["company"] = company

    children = frappe.get_all(
        "Employee",
        filters=filters,
        fields=["name", "employee_name", "department", "company", "designation", "branch", "custom_operation",
                "manufacturer", "reporting_employee_name_","status","image"]
    )

    # Task stats
    open_task = 0
    closed_task = 0
    cancelled_task = 0
    description = ""

    if emp_doc.user_id:
        todos = frappe.get_all(
            "ToDo",
            filters={"allocated_to": emp_doc.user_id},
            fields=["status", "description"]
        )
        for todo in todos:
            if todo.status == "Open":
                open_task = open_task + 1
            elif todo.status == "Closed":
                closed_task = closed_task + 1
            elif todo.status == "Cancelled":
                cancelled_task = cancelled_task + 1
        if todos:
            description = todos[0].get("description", "")

    # Recursively fetch children
    reports = []
    for child in children:
        report = fetch_reports(child["name"], company, branch, department, operation, designation)
        if report:
            reports.append(report)

    # Check if current node or any child matches the filter
    is_valid = (
        (not branch or emp_doc.branch == branch) and
        (not department or emp_doc.department == department) and
        (not designation or emp_doc.designation == designation) and
        (not operation or (emp_doc.custom_operation or "").strip().lower() == operation.strip().lower()) 
        # and (not employee or emp_doc.name == employee)
    )


    if is_valid or reports:
        # Group direct reports by designation
        direct_report_counts = {}
        for child in children:
            desig = child.get("designation")
            if desig:
                direct_report_counts[desig] = direct_report_counts.get(desig, 0) + 1

        return {
            "id": emp_doc.name,
            "name": emp_doc.employee_name,
            "company": emp_doc.company,
            "branch": emp_doc.branch,
            "custom_operation": emp_doc.custom_operation,
            "status": emp_doc.status,
            "image": emp_doc.image,
            "department": emp_doc.department,
            "designation": emp_doc.designation,
            "manufacturer": emp_doc.manufacturer,
            "reporting_employee_name_": emp_doc.reporting_employee_name_,
            "user_id": emp_doc.user_id,
            "open_task": open_task,
            "closed_task": closed_task,
            "cancelled_task": cancelled_task,
            "description": description,
            "reports": reports,
            "direct_report_counts": direct_report_counts  # 👈 Add this!
        }
    else:
        return None

company_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("company")
department_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("department")
branch_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("branch")
operation_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("operation")
employee_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("employee")
designation_filter = frappe.form_dict.get("designation")

if company_filter == "KG GK Jewellers Private Limited":
    root_emp = fetch_reports("GEPL - 00002", company=company_filter, branch=branch_filter, department=department_filter, operation=operation_filter,designation=designation_filter)
    additional_emp = fetch_reports("GEPL - 00006", company=company_filter, branch=branch_filter, department=department_filter, operation=operation_filter,designation=designation_filter)

    if root_emp and additional_emp:
        root_emp["reports"].append(additional_emp)
        db_data = root_emp
    elif root_emp:

    elif additional_emp:

elif employee_filter:

else:

def clean_and_sort_reports(node):
    # Base case: if no reports key, do nothing
    if "reports" not in node or not isinstance(node["reports"], list):
        return

    # Filter out empty dicts (invalid reports)
    node["reports"] = [r for r in node["reports"] if isinstance(r, dict) and r.get("id")]

    # Recursively clean and sort children first
    for child in node["reports"]:
        clean_and_sort_reports(child)

    # Sort reports: nodes with their own valid children come first
    node["reports"].sort(
        key=lambda x: len([r for r in x.get("reports", []) if r.get("id")]),
        reverse=True
    )
    
if db_data:
    clean_and_sort_reports(db_data)

    frappe.response['message'] = db_data

def add_dict1(data):
    expanded_data = data.copy()  # Start with a copy of the original data

    for original_name, original_dict in data.items():
        # Gather all similar, set, and sufix item codes into lists
        similar_items = [{"item_code": entry["item_code"], "image": entry["image"], "reason": entry.get("reason", "")} for entry in original_dict.get("similar", [])]
        set_items = [{"item_code": entry["item_code"], "image": entry["image"], "reason": entry.get("reason", "")} for entry in original_dict.get("set", [])]
        sufix_items = [{"item_code": entry["item_code"], "image": entry["image"], "reason": entry.get("reason", "")} for entry in original_dict.get("sufix", [])]

        # Process similar items
        for similar_item in similar_items:
            new_dict_key = similar_item["item_code"].strip()  # This will be the new "name"

            # If this item already exists, skip to avoid duplication
            if new_dict_key in expanded_data:
                continue

            # Create a new "similar" structure, keeping the original images and reason
            new_similar_list = []
            for other_item in similar_items:
                if other_item["item_code"] == similar_item["item_code"]:
                    new_similar_list.append({
                        "item_code": original_name,  # Reference back to the original item
                        "image": original_dict["image"],  # Use original image of the first item
                        "reason": other_item["reason"] if other_item["reason"] else similar_item["reason"]  # Retain original reason
                    })
                else:
                    new_similar_list.append({
                        "item_code": other_item["item_code"],
                        "image": other_item["image"],  # Retain the image from the similar item
                        "reason": other_item["reason"] if other_item["reason"] else similar_item["reason"]  # Retain original reason
                    })

            # Create the new dictionary entry for similar items
            new_dict_value = {
                "image": similar_item["image"],  # Retain the image for this similar item
                "similar": new_similar_list  # Maintain the format for similar items with reason
            }

            # Add the new dictionary to the expanded data
            expanded_data[new_dict_key] = new_dict_value

        # Process set items
        for set_item in set_items:
            new_set_key = set_item["item_code"].strip()  # This will be the new "name"

            # If this item already exists, skip to avoid duplication
            if new_set_key in expanded_data:
                continue

            # Create a new "set" structure
            new_set_list = []
            for other_set_item in set_items:
                if other_set_item["item_code"] == set_item["item_code"]:
                    new_set_list.append({
                        "item_code": original_name,  # Reference back to the original item
                        "image": original_dict["image"],  # Use the original image if applicable
                        "reason": other_set_item["reason"] if other_set_item["reason"] else set_item["reason"]  # Retain original reason
                    })
                else:
                    new_set_list.append({
                        "item_code": other_set_item["item_code"],
                        "image": other_set_item["image"],
                        "reason": other_set_item["reason"] if other_set_item["reason"] else set_item["reason"]  # Retain original reason
                    })

            # Create the new dictionary entry for set items
            new_set_value = {
                "image": set_item["image"],  # Assuming no specific image for the set item
                "set": new_set_list  # Maintain the format for set items with reason
            }

            # Add the new dictionary to the expanded data
            expanded_data[new_set_key] = new_set_value

        # Process sufix items
        for sufix_item in sufix_items:
            new_sufix_key = sufix_item["item_code"].strip()  # This will be the new "name"

            # If this item already exists, skip to avoid duplication
            if new_sufix_key in expanded_data:
                continue

            # Check if reverse reference already exists to avoid circular references
            if any(x['item_code'] == original_name for x in expanded_data.get(new_sufix_key, {}).get("sufix", [])):
                continue

            # Create a new "sufix" structure
            new_sufix_list = []
            for other_sufix_item in sufix_items:
                if other_sufix_item["item_code"] == sufix_item["item_code"]:
                    new_sufix_list.append({
                        "item_code": original_name,  # Reference back to the original item
                        "image": original_dict["image"],  # Use the original image if applicable
                        "reason": other_sufix_item["reason"] if other_sufix_item["reason"] else sufix_item["reason"]  # Retain original reason
                    })
                else:
                    new_sufix_list.append({
                        "item_code": other_sufix_item["item_code"],
                        "image": other_sufix_item["image"],
                        "reason": other_sufix_item["reason"] if other_sufix_item["reason"] else sufix_item["reason"]  # Retain original reason
                    })

            # Create the new dictionary entry for sufix items
            new_sufix_value = {
                "image": sufix_item["image"],  # Assuming no specific image for the sufix item
                "sufix": new_sufix_list  # Maintain the format for sufix items with reason
            }

            # Add the new dictionary to the expanded data
            expanded_data[new_sufix_key] = new_sufix_value

    return expanded_data

def check_similar_items(similar_items):

def create_group_for_similar(doc):
    old_len = frappe.db.sql(f"""select count(*) from `tabSimilar Item Table` where parent = '{doc.name}'""",as_dict=1)[0]['count(*)']
    
    if old_len != len(doc.custom_similar_item_table):
        #item from similar item table
        lastSimilar_itemcode = doc.custom_similar_item_table[-1].get('item_code')
     
        item_ref_doc = frappe.db.sql(f""" select tsit.item_code,trg.name from `tabItem Reference Group` as trg
            left join `tabSimilar Item Table` as tsit on tsit.parent = trg.name 
            where tsit.item_code = '{lastSimilar_itemcode}' and trg.item_reference_type = 'Similar'
        """, as_dict=1)
        
        # same similar item code as parent item code - add into exiting item code
        nameitem_ref_doc = frappe.db.sql(f"""
            select tsit.item_code,trg.name 
                from `tabItem Reference Group` as trg
            left join `tabSimilar Item Table` as tsit 
                on tsit.parent = trg.name or trg.item_code = tsit.item_code
            where tsit.item_code = '{doc.name}' and trg.item_reference_type = 'Similar'
        """, as_dict=1)
        
        #item from reference group when add item in same child table 
        same_ref_doc = frappe.db.sql(f"""
            select DISTINCT (trg.name) ,tsit.item_code
                from `tabItem Reference Group` as trg
